title: gcs driver backend config
description: Schema for the config: block under a backend entry whose driver is gcs. Control plane authenticates via Application Default Credentials (GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS on the controller Deployment; STORAGE_EMULATOR_HOST is honoured for emulators); the credential fields here are the S3-interop data-plane pair written to access Secrets.

project.description: GCP project ID buckets are created in. Also written to access Secrets under the project key.

endpoint.description: S3-interop endpoint written to access Secrets. Defaults to https://storage.googleapis.com. Override for emulators (fake-gcs-server) so consumers reach the same endpoint the controller provisions against; the control plane itself follows ADC/STORAGE_EMULATOR_HOST, not this field.

accessKeyID.description: Static HMAC access key ID copied into every access Secret. Mint out of band for a service account with access to this backend's buckets: gcloud storage hmac create <sa-email>. envsubst:"true" - supports ${VAR} interpolation at controller startup.

secretAccessKey.description: Static HMAC secret copied into every access Secret. envsubst:"true" - supports ${VAR} interpolation at controller startup.
